targets.query:
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "predicted_savings_eur")
imp = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_predicted_savings_eur" and r._field == "value")
union(tables: [live, imp])
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Predicted savings"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "predicted_baseline_eur")
imp = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_predicted_baseline_cost_eur" and r._field == "value")
union(tables: [live, imp])
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Baseline cost"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "predicted_optimized_eur")
imp = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: -24h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_predicted_optimized_cost_eur" and r._field == "value")
union(tables: [live, imp])
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Optimized cost"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

panels.title: Predicted 36h savings — how the forecast evolves

targets.query:
live = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_state" and r._field == "predicted_savings_eur")
imp = from(bucket: "zeus") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_predicted_savings_eur" and r._field == "value")
union(tables: [live, imp])
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 15m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Predicted savings (next 36h)"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: -1h, stop: 48h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_forecast" and r._field == "cum_savings_eur")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Cumulative predicted savings (€)"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])

from(bucket: "zeus")
  |> range(start: -1h, stop: 48h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "zeus_forecast" and r._field == "load_kwh")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Predicted load (kWh/slot)"})
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
